name: Org Settings
description: Org name, slug (locked post-publish), branding, timezone, public-page settings.

name: Member Directory
description: List of all users in the Org with roles, statuses, last-login; invite/revoke/role-change actions.

name: Org Audit Log
description: Org-scoped audit events; searchable, filterable, CSV export.

name: Tournament List
description: List of all tournaments in the Org with status filter; entry point to per-Tournament modules.

name: Org Branding
description: Logo, primary brand color, public-facing description.

name: Tournament Editor
description: Wizard + edit views for basics, format, structured rules, prose rulebook, dates, venues, registration window.

name: Bracket Editor
description: Auto-generate + drag-drop bracket; lock/unlock.

name: Schedule Editor
description: Auto-generate + drag-drop schedule; conflict warnings.

name: Team Registration Manager
description: Approve/reject team registrations, withdraw, disqualify.

name: Player Roster Manager
description: Add/edit/remove players; eligibility freeze; suspension overrides.

name: Lineup Manager
description: View/override lineups for any match in the tournament.

name: Tournament Audit Log
description: Tournament-scoped audit events.

name: Registration forms
description: Build, publish, and manage data-driven registration forms; review responses.

name: Tournament Report Export
description: End-of-tournament PDF (standings + top scorers + match results + bracket).

name: Pre-Tournament Checklist
description: Single-screen readiness summary.

name: Today's Day-Pack Export
description: PDF for venue use (schedule + roster + blank lineup/match-card forms).

name: Scoring Console
description: Live scoring UI — clock, event entry, player picker.

name: Assign Officials
description: Assign referees, assistants, scorers and courts to matches.

name: Referee Console
description: Real-time event review, correction, post-match approval.

name: Match Center (admin view)
description: Match details with admin overlays — submitted lineups, raw event log, scorer/referee identities.

name: Lineup Submission
description: Submit lineup as TM or override-submit as Admin.

name: Notification Preferences
description: (event_type × channel) toggle matrix.

name: Personal Profile
description: Edit own name, photo, email, password, 2FA.

name: Feedback Widget
description: Submit bug/feature/complaint feedback (lands in Super-admin's Feedback Inbox).
